highlights.description: AI-powered code review tool for GitHub PRs with SDK, CLI, and MCP server interfaces
Reviews posted as GitHub App bot for clear distinction from human reviews

added.description: Go SDK (`pkg/review`) for GitHub code review operations: CreateReview, CreateComment, CreateLineComment, GetPR, GetPRDiff, ListOpenPRs
MCP server (`internal/mcp`) exposing 6 tools for Claude Code integration: review_pr, comment_pr, line_comment, get_pr_diff, get_pr, list_prs
CLI (`cmd/acr`) with commands: review, comment, diff, get, list, serve
Config package (`pkg/config`) for auth resolution and client creation
Input package (`pkg/input`) for PR number parsing, body reading, and event validation
Dual authentication support: GitHub App or personal access token
Flexible CLI input: body from flags, files, or stdin
JSON output mode for CLI commands

fixed.description: Add error wrapping to SDK write operations for better debugging

tests.description: Unit tests for `pkg/review` with mock GitHub server
Unit tests for `pkg/config` covering repo resolution scenarios
Unit tests for `pkg/input` covering PR parsing, body reading, and event validation

documentation.description: README with installation, authentication setup, CLI usage, SDK integration, and MCP configuration
Agent specification for code reviewer in multi-agent-spec format

build.description: GitHub Actions workflows for CI, linting, integration tests, and CodeQL SAST
Makefile with targets: build, test, lint, clean, install, serve, fmt, deps
golangci-lint configuration with errcheck, gosec, errorlint, and others
